name: dashboarddesignanalysis
observations: Monorepo with three active applications: Cabinet frontend, Landing frontend, and Backend API.
Backend is the source of truth for validation, state transitions, and business rules.
Repository follows AGENTS.md constraints for scoped changes and non-destructive operations.

name: AGENTS.md
observations: Defines coding-agent rules and repository-specific conventions.
Forbids modifying opencode.json and .opencode/.
Forbids creating commits unless explicitly requested.

name: Cabinet App
observations: Main Next.js 16 frontend located at repository root.
Primary directories: /app, /components, /hooks, /lib.
Uses TypeScript with strict mode.

name: Landing App
observations: Next.js 16 frontend located in /lider-garant.
Source code is primarily under /lider-garant/src.
Uses TypeScript with strict mode.

name: Backend API
observations: Django 5 + DRF backend located in /backend.
Acts as business-logic authority for the monorepo.
Exposes REST APIs and websocket routes for chat.

name: Next.js 16
observations: Used by both Cabinet App and Landing App.

name: Django 5
observations: Used by Backend API for server-side architecture.

name: Django REST Framework
observations: Used by Backend API for API views, serializers, and response patterns.

name: Django Channels
observations: Used by Backend API for websocket functionality in chat.

name: JWT Authentication
observations: Backend authentication stack includes JWT-based authentication.

name: Docker Compose
observations: Development and production compose files orchestrate multi-service runtime.
Services include backend, frontend apps, database, redis, object storage, and nginx.

name: PostgreSQL
observations: Used as primary relational database service in dockerized environments.

name: Redis
observations: Used as cache/broker-style infra component in compose setup.

name: MinIO
observations: Included in compose setup for object/file storage needs.

name: app/
observations: Contains Cabinet app routes and layout files.

name: components/
observations: Contains Cabinet UI/dashboard components.

name: hooks/
observations: Contains Cabinet React hooks.

name: lib/
observations: Contains shared Cabinet API, auth, mappings, schemas, and utility modules.

name: lider-garant/src/
observations: Contains Landing frontend source modules.

name: backend/apps/
observations: Contains Django domain apps and business modules.

name: lib/api.ts
observations: Shared frontend API client module in Cabinet app.
Preferred API integration path instead of ad-hoc fetch calls.

name: lib/auth-context.tsx
observations: Cabinet authentication provider/context module.

name: lib/status-mapping.ts
observations: Shared status mapping helper for frontend flows.

name: lib/application-statuses.ts
observations: Shared application status definitions/mapping helper.

name: backend/config/urls.py
observations: Main backend URL router that mounts app endpoints.

name: backend/config/asgi.py
observations: ASGI configuration file wiring websocket/routing runtime.

name: backend/config/settings/base.py
observations: Core backend settings file with shared configuration defaults.

name: backend/apps/applications/tests.py
observations: Contains Django tests for application workflows and assignment behavior.
Includes tests around public lead create behavior and partner assignment cases.

name: No destructive git commands
observations: Disallow destructive operations like hard reset or force push without explicit request.

name: No implicit commits
observations: Commits are only allowed when explicitly requested by the user.

name: No opencode metadata changes
observations: Do not create or modify opencode.json or .opencode/.

name: Users App
observations: Backend domain app for user accounts, roles, permissions, and related API flows.
Key files include models.py, serializers.py, views.py, permissions.py, and urls.py.

name: Companies App
observations: Backend domain app for company profile data and related operations.
Contains models, serializers, views, signals, and urls modules.

name: Applications App
observations: Backend domain app for credit/financial application lifecycle and assignment logic.
Contains models, serializers, views, urls, and tests.

name: Documents App
observations: Backend domain app for document entities and API handling.
Uses product-dependent document type identifiers in business flow.

name: Bank Conditions App
observations: Backend domain app for bank condition data and related APIs.

name: Chat App
observations: Backend domain app for chat models, APIs, and websocket routing/consumers.

name: Notifications App
observations: Backend domain app for notifications and email delivery pipeline.
Includes email service and management commands for outbox processing and checks.

name: News App
observations: Backend domain app for news content models and APIs.

name: SEO App
observations: Backend domain app for SEO page management APIs and template autofill behavior.
Separates public/admin behavior paths.

name: Dictionaries App
observations: Backend domain app exposing dictionary/reference APIs via serializers and views.

name: Integrations Service
observations: Integration utilities exist in backend/apps/integrations/services.py.

name: Custom User Model
observations: Backend uses a custom user model implementation.
Role-based behavior is central to access and workflow assignment.

name: User Roles
observations: Observed roles: client, agent, partner, admin, seo.

name: Company Profile Schema
observations: Company data model includes broad legal/business profile fields.
Schema includes founder/leadership/MCHD/tax-related attributes.

name: Application Workflow
observations: Applications app implements status-driven lifecycle for multiple product types.
Workflow integrates assignment logic and bank-facing integration fields.

name: Document Type Mapping
observations: Document library flow uses numeric document_type_id mappings tied to product type.

name: Lead Pipeline
observations: Supports public lead creation and admin conversion to application flow.

name: Notification Outbox Worker
observations: Reliable SMTP outbox processing with retry/background handling is implemented.

name: SEO Template Autofill
observations: SEO utilities include template/autofill support for page management.

name: backend/apps/chat/routing.py
observations: Defines websocket URL routing for chat functionality.

name: backend/apps/notifications/email_service.py
observations: Encapsulates notification email delivery service logic.

name: backend/apps/notifications/management/commands/process_email_outbox.py
observations: Management command to process queued email outbox messages.

name: backend/apps/seo/utils/templates.py
observations: Utility module for SEO templates and autofill behavior.

name: Backend Django Tests
observations: Django test framework is configured in backend.
Targeted test execution is supported down to single test method via manage.py test dotted path.

name: Frontend Automated Test Config
observations: No Jest, Vitest, or Playwright configuration was observed in this repository state.

name: lib/document-types.ts
observations: Shared frontend document-type helper/mapping module in Cabinet lib.

name: lib/bank-document-requirements.ts
observations: Shared frontend module for bank document requirement mapping/logic.

name: lib/company-schemas.ts
observations: Shared frontend schema module for company-related structures.

name: lib/form-utils.ts
observations: Shared frontend form utility helpers in Cabinet lib.

name: Landing Auth Context
observations: Landing app auth provider is located under /lider-garant/src/lib/auth-context (per project guidelines).

name: Cabinet Auth Context
observations: Cabinet auth provider module path is /lib/auth-context.tsx.

name: Shared Status Helpers
observations: Frontend status handling reuses lib/status-mapping.ts and lib/application-statuses.ts helpers.

name: PopularSearchesFix
observations: Fixed /v-razrabotke fallback in popular-searches.ts - changed default to #application
Removed explicit /v-razrabotke from bank-guarantee-client.tsx
Removed duplicate normalizePopularSearches from tender-support-client.tsx, now uses shared lib version
Added visual warning banner in seo-page-editor.tsx when popular_searches is empty
Build verified passing after changes
Root cause: hardcoded /v-razrabotke as fallback href when SEO data has no popular_searches hrefs

name: SEO-system-architecture
observations: SEO pages are stored in Django backend (SeoPage model) with slug, popular_searches (JSON [{text, href}]), faq, bank_offers fields
Frontend catch-all route [...slug]/page.tsx renders SEO pages dynamically via getSeoPage(slug)
Product pages (bankovskie-garantii, kredity etc) are STATIC Next.js pages, but call getSeoPage(slug) for SEO data
If getSeoPage returns data with popular_searches, those are used for the 'Часто ищут' block
If getSeoPage returns null or empty popular_searches, fallback defaultPopularSearchTerms from code are used
SEO admin panel: /seo-manager/dashboard (requires admin/seo role)
SEO API endpoint: /api/seo/pages/ (public GET), /api/seo/pages-admin-list/ (admin)

name: popular-searches-flow
observations: normalizePopularSearches(value, fallbackTerms, fallbackHref) in popular-searches.ts is the core function
If value (from API) is non-empty array -> uses API data (ignores fallbackTerms)
If value is null/empty -> maps fallbackTerms, using fallbackHref for string-only terms
Each product page passes its form anchor as fallbackHref: #form, #factoring-form, #leasing-form, etc.
SEO editor in seo-page-editor.tsx has its own normalizePopularSearches (duplicate)
The datalist for href field suggests existing SEO page slugs for easy linking

name: reserved-slugs-behavior
observations: RESERVED_STATIC_SLUGS in seo-page-editor.tsx lists product page slugs like bankovskie-garantii, rko, etc.
Warning is informational only - does NOT block saving
Creating SEO entry with reserved slug is valid and useful: it provides SEO metadata + popular_searches data to the static product page
The static page still renders its own template but uses popular_searches from the SEO API entry if available

name: SEO Page System
observations: SeoPage Django model in backend/apps/seo/models.py with slug-keyed pages, JSONField for popular_searches, faq, bank_offers
Three render paths: (1) static product pages with client components, (2) SeoTemplatePage for create-page layout, (3) catch-all [...slug]/page.tsx generic layout
popular_searches stored as JSONField - accepts both string[] and {text,href}[] formats, backend serializer normalizes
normalizePopularSearches() in lider-garant/src/lib/popular-searches.ts handles string-to-object normalization with fallback terms
10 static product pages each have hardcoded defaultPopularSearchTerms as fallback in their client components
SeoTemplatePage component has showPopularSearches prop (default true) to toggle Часто ищут section
isCreatePageLayout() in lib/seo-template-utils.ts checks template_name === 'create-page'
API endpoints mounted at /api/seo/pages/ with slug lookup, public GET (AllowAny, published only), admin CRUD (IsSeoManagerOrAdmin)
FrequentlySearched.tsx is dead code - not imported anywhere, superseded by inline rendering

name: SEO Editor Modal
observations: Located at lider-garant/src/components/seo/seo-page-editor.tsx (1262 lines)
5 tabs: Main, Meta, Content, FAQ, Offers
Uses Dialog from ui/dialog.tsx which has base sm:p-6 padding
Must override with both p-0 AND sm:p-0 to prevent padding conflict stealing vertical space
DialogFooter contains Save button - becomes unreachable if vertical space is consumed by padding
Previous session fixed dialog height/positioning, current session fixed sm:p-0 override

Bug 4 fixed: Added h-0 to three flex intermediaries (inner wrapper line 638, Tabs line 639, scrollable div line 678) to fix Safari scroll issue on small screens. Safari needs explicit height:0 alongside flex-1 min-h-0 in deeply nested flex containers to properly constrain height and activate overflow-y-auto.
All 4 SEO editor bugs now resolved: (1) save button padding sm:p-0, (2) popular searches hidden on child pages, (3) navigation links with {text,href} objects, (4) Safari scroll fix with h-0

name: SEO Catch-All Route
observations: Located at lider-garant/src/app/[...slug]/page.tsx
Renders any slug not matched by static routes via getSeoPage(slug)
Two render paths: shouldRenderTemplatePage -> SeoTemplatePage, else -> inline generic layout
After fix: showPopularSearches={false} passed to SeoTemplatePage, inline popular searches block removed
normalizeUiHref helper used for href normalization, isExternalHref removed as unused after cleanup

name: Bank Guarantee Root Page
observations: Static route at /bankovskie-garantii with server page.tsx + bank-guarantee-client.tsx
defaultPopularSearchTerms array has 18 items with {text, href} objects linking to child SEO page slugs
Uses normalizePopularSearches() from lib/popular-searches.ts with fallback to defaultPopularSearchTerms
Child SEO pages (e.g. bankovskie-garantii-na-avansoviy-platej) must be created via SEO manager for links to work
DB record for slug 'bankovskie-garantii' has popular_searches as plain strings (legacy format) - client fallback takes priority

name: Partners Pagination Bug
observations: Root cause: DRF global pagination (PageNumberPagination, PAGE_SIZE=20) in base.py:199-200 applies to AdminBankViewSet which has no pagination_class override
Frontend use-admin-banks.ts:72-73 only reads response.results from first page, ignoring next/count
Partners are displayed through bank list in partners-tab.tsx, not directly
When bank count exceeds 20, older banks disappear from the admin partners view
Fix: Add pagination_class = None to AdminBankViewSet in bank_conditions/views.py:42
Only 2 viewsets in entire project explicitly disable pagination: seo/views.py and notifications/views.py

name: TaskBacklog_2026_03
observations: 8 задач от пользователя (backlog March 2026)
1) Проверить настройку отправки чеков в налоговую в платежной системе WalletOne
2) В рубрике ПРОДАЖА отобразить признак объявления из рубрики ОБМЕН
3) Редактирование Супер-Админом профиля пользователя - ошибка 500 при сохранении
4) Сделать поле № квартиры обязательным для заполнения
5) На форме входа галочка Запомнить - проверить работоспособность
6) В фильтре рубрики Обмен изменить текст подсказки поля Тип доплаты
7) Убрать служебные поля из формы создания объявления для простых пользователей
8) Скрыть номер телефона для неавторизованных в рубрике Продажа (представление Таблица)
НОВЫЙ КОНТЕКСТ: Пользователь наблюдает несрабатывание опций настроек ролей/прав в Админке - возможно связано с обновлением Laravel
УТОЧНЕНИЕ: Для неавторизованных в рубрике Обмен - Адрес ДОЛЖЕН показываться, телефон - по подписке через ссылку Открыть доступ
УТОЧНЕНИЕ: Сайт в тестовом режиме оплаты, пользователь не хочет выходить из тестового режима для проверки чеков
ВОПРОС: Нужно определить, интегрирован ли на сайт скрипт по выдаче чеков онлайн (фискализация)
ГИПОТЕЗА ПОЛЬЗОВАТЕЛЯ: проблемы с правами могут быть вызваны обновлением Laravel (9->10)

name: ProjectStack
observations: Laravel 10, PHP 8.1+, Vue 2.1, jQuery, Bootstrap-Sass, Laravel Mix
Auth: cartalyst/sentinel (NOT standard Laravel Auth)
DB: PostgreSQL via Eloquent ORM, Doctrine DBAL present
Testing: PHPUnit 10, Error tracking: Sentry
Legacy project - two major Laravel upgrades (jump + 9->10)

name: Bug_ProfileUpdate500
observations: ProfileController::update() line 63 uses Sentinel::getUser() instead of the edited user
When SuperAdmin edits another user profile, update() modifies admin's own profile with other user's data
Causes 500 due to email unique constraint violation or unexpected field writes
Fix: add admin check + load target user by request('edit') parameter, same logic as edit() method
Пользователь подтвердил ошибку 500 при редактировании профиля Супер-Админом

name: Bug_PhoneVisibility
observations: Phone number visible to unauthorized users in sell/rent table view, grid view, row view
__table_view_list.blade.php lines 174-175: includes phone partial unconditionally for non-exchange ads
__table_view_list--phone.blade.php line 14: shows $ad->user->phone without auth check
sell/grid_view_list.blade.php lines 102-106: shows phone without auth check
sell/row_view_list.blade.php: no phone shown (OK)
Fix: wrap phone display in @if($user) check across all affected views

name: Bug_TooltipSurchargeType
observations: __filter-exchange.blade.php line 312: title='Тип обмена' should be title='Тип доплаты'
Placeholder is correct ('Тип доплаты') but tooltip is wrong ('Тип обмена')
One-line fix

name: AdSystem
observations: Ad types: sell (Продаю), exchange (Обмен), rent (Аренда) - defined in config/site.php
show_in_sells flag on exchange ads allows them to appear in sell listings
include_exchanges filter checkbox in sell filter enables cross-rubric display
$canManageOwnerFields gates service fields: source, source_owner_phone, source_owner_name
$canPublish gates the active checkbox
affiliate_sales_sum field is NOT gated by any permission check
Phone visibility: view.exchange.contacts permission for exchange, NO auth check for sell/rent
room_number field (apartment number) in formsGeoMapBlock.blade.php - not required

name: PaymentSystem
observations: Two providers: WalletOne and YooKassa, managed by PaymentManager
WalletOne: NO fiscal/receipt support in code - fiscalization configured in WalletOne merchant dashboard
YooKassa: full 54-FZ receipt support via buildReceipt() method
Settings stored in DB via Krucas/Settings: wallet_one_enabled, wallet_one_merchant_id, wallet_one_secret_key
Admin settings page at /dashboard/settings has full payment config section

name: AuthSystem
observations: Login uses Cartalyst Sentinel, NOT Laravel Auth
Remember me: Sentinel::authenticateAndRemember() creates persistent cookie
LoginController::loginAttempt() checks request->has('remember') then calls login(credentials, true)
Login form: resources/views/admin/auth/login.blade.php with checkbox name=remember
Cookie domain may be issue with subdomain routing - needs testing
ПРОБЛЕМА: Настройки ролей/прав в Админке (Sentinel permissions) не работают как ожидается
Нужно проверить совместимость Cartalyst Sentinel 7 с Laravel 10

name: SentinelCastsOverrideBug
observations: App\User (line 83) declares $casts WITHOUT 'permissions' => 'json', completely replacing parent EloquentUser's $casts which HAD it
In PHP, child class property REPLACES parent — no merging. So permissions column loses JSON auto-cast on the User model
If user has non-NULL personal permissions in DB, $this->permissions returns raw JSON string instead of array
StrictPermissions constructor expects array|null — would get string — potential TypeError on PHP 8.1
LATENT BUG: only explodes when user has personal user-level permissions set (not just role permissions)
Most users likely have NULL permissions (role-only), so this bug is dormant
FIX: Add 'permissions' => 'json' to App\User::$casts array

name: SentinelPermissionsFlowAnalysis
observations: Full Sentinel v7 source code retrieved from GitHub for EloquentRole, EloquentUser, StrictPermissions, PermissionsTrait, PermissibleTrait
EloquentRole has $casts = ['permissions' => 'json'] — role permissions work correctly
EloquentUser::createPermissions() collects user permissions (primary) + role permissions (secondary) into StrictPermissions
StrictPermissions::createPreparedPermissions() processes roles FIRST, then user. false ALWAYS overrides true in preparePermissions()
updatePermissions() in RolesController uses Sentinel::findRoleById() (correct EloquentRole) — saves correctly with JSON cast
permissions() display uses json_decode() manually on App\Models\Role — works despite no cast
\Input facade is SAFE — aliased to Request at config/app.php:258
Role edit form (edit.blade.php) only edits name/slug/allow_purchase/sort_order — NOT permissions directly
New role creation sets raw JSON string for permissions — works when read back via EloquentRole JSON cast
permissions catalog table stores available permission keys with descriptions and role-group labels

name: PermissionCatalogGap
observations: config/permissions.php defines ONLY 20 permission keys
Code uses 31+ unique permission keys in hasAccess/hasAnyAccess calls
14 permission keys used in code are NOT in the catalog and CANNOT be assigned via admin UI

Missing critical keys: view.exchange.contacts, view.exchange.map, ads.show_owner_phone, ads.sell.free_source, ads.rent.free_source, ads.exchange.free_source, ads.rent_added_forbidden, sell.rent_added_forbidden, exchange.remove_limit_count, admin.orders
This is likely the ROOT CAUSE of 'permissions not working' — admins cannot manage these permissions through the UI
Fix: Add missing keys to config/permissions.php and re-run PermissionsTableSeeder, or add them directly to the permissions table

name: SuperAdminTypoBug
observations: SubscriptionController.php line 500: uses 'super_admin' (underscore) — WRONG key, never matches
SubscriptionController.php line 507: uses 'superAdmin' (camelCase) — correct key
The typo at line 500 means the super admin permission check for ad publishing silently fails
Fix: Change 'super_admin' to 'superAdmin' at line 500

name: AffiliateSalesSumNotGated
observations: sellForm.blade.php line 84-85: affiliate_sales_sum ('Сумма по СПП') field visible to ALL users, not gated by $canManageOwnerFields
__table_view_list.blade.php line 110-112: 'СПП: X ₽' shown to ALL users in listings when is_affiliate_sales=true
This is a service/internal field that should only be visible to admins/privileged users
Field only exists in sell forms, not in exchange or rent forms
Fix: Wrap field in @if($canManageOwnerFields) in sellForm.blade.php, and add permission check in __table_view_list.blade.php

name: RememberMeAnalysis
observations: Sentinel authenticateAndRemember() calls authenticate($credentials, true)
persist() stores persistence code in session + cookie (IlluminateCookie::put uses $jar->forever() = 5-year cookie)
check() reads session first, then cookie — correct order
Cookie key: 'cartalyst_sentinel' from config
Session config: driver=file, lifetime=120min, expire_on_close=false, secure=env('SESSION_SECURE_COOKIE', null), domain=env('SESSION_DOMAIN', null), same_site=lax
Code is mechanically correct — needs runtime verification
Likely failure causes: SESSION_SECURE_COOKIE=true on HTTP site, SESSION_DOMAIN mismatch, APP_KEY change invalidating encrypted cookies, browser cookie settings

name: PhoneVisibilityFullMap
observations: SELL sell/show.blade.php:31 — phone shown to ALL logged-in users (@if isset($user))
SELL sell/grid_view_list.blade.php:96 — phone shown unconditionally (hasAnyAccess only controls tooltip)
SELL sell/row_view_list.blade.php — NO phone shown (OK)
SELL __table_view_list.blade.php:174-175 — phone shown unconditionally for sell/rent
RENT rent/show.blade.php:31 — phone shown to ALL logged-in users
RENT rent/show.blade.php:172-175 — phone shown to unauthenticated AND free role users!
RENT rent/grid_view_list.blade.php:93-97 — phone shown in BOTH if/else branches
RENT rent/row_view_list.blade.php — NO phone shown (OK)
EXCHANGE exchange/show.blade.php:52-61 — PROPERLY gated by view.exchange.contacts
EXCHANGE exchange/show.blade.php:216-219 — phone shown to unauthenticated AND free role (BUG!)
EXCHANGE grid/row views — properly gated

name: ExchangeBadgeAnalysis
observations: $ad->ad_type field available on all ad objects (values: 'Продаю', 'Аренда', 'Обмен')
include_exchanges filter uses OR clause: ad_type='Продаю' OR (ad_type='Обмен' AND show_in_sells=1)
NO visual badge/label/icon exists anywhere in sell views to distinguish exchange ads
__table_view_list--address.blade.php checks ad_type but only for city display logic, not badge
show_in_sells boolean column added by migration 2020_05_21_175314
Fix: Add conditional badge based on $ad->ad_type === 'Обмен' in sell listing views

name: CastsOverrideConfirmed
observations: Laravel 10 getCasts() returns $this->casts directly — NO parent merging
PHP property inheritance REPLACES parent property completely
App\User $casts omits 'permissions' => 'json' from parent EloquentUser
mergeCasts() exists but must be called explicitly — it's not automatic
getPermissionsArrayAttribute() in App\Models\Role also broken (is_countable on string returns false) but unused in codebase

name: ComposerServiceProviderAnalysis
observations: ComposerServiceProvider.php line 39-46: View::composer for layouts and frontend.ads.* views
$user = Sentinel::getUser() when Sentinel::check() is true, null otherwise
$user is always available in frontend views via this composer
For unauthenticated users, $user is null — views must check $user before calling methods

name: AllFixesAppliedSession2
observations: Session 2: Applied all 8 task fixes plus 2 bonus bug fixes (casts override, super_admin typo)
Total files modified: 16 files across controllers, views, config, and request validation classes
All fixes follow DO NO HARM principle - minimal surgical changes only

name: Fix_CastsOverride
observations: FIXED: app/User.php line 83 - added 'permissions' => 'json' to $casts array
Root cause: App\User $casts completely replaced parent EloquentUser $casts which had permissions=>json
Laravel 10 getCasts() returns $this->casts directly with NO parent merging
Without this fix, users with personal permissions get TypeError when StrictPermissions receives string instead of array

name: Fix_SuperAdminTypo
observations: FIXED: app/Http/Controllers/User/SubscriptionController.php line 500
Changed 'super_admin' (underscore) to 'superAdmin' (camelCase) to match the actual permission key
Line 507 already had correct 'superAdmin' - only line 500 had the typo

name: Fix_PermissionCatalog
observations: FIXED: config/permissions.php - added 14 missing permission keys that were used in code but not in catalog

Added: view.exchange.contacts, view.exchange.map, ads.show_owner_phone, ads.favorites, ads.sell.free_source, ads.rent.free_source, ads.exchange.free_source, exchange.remove_limit_count, ads.rent_added_forbidden, sell.rent_added_forbidden, admin, superAdmin, admin.orders
DEPLOY REQUIRED: Must run PermissionsTableSeeder after deploy to populate new keys into permissions DB table
Without seeder run, new keys exist in config but not in DB, so admin UI still won't show them

name: Fix_ProfileController500
observations: FIXED: app/Http/Controllers/User/ProfileController.php update() method
Root cause: line 63 used Sentinel::getUser() which always returned logged-in admin, not target user
Fix: checks request->has('edit') && admin access, then loads target user via User::findOrFail
Added security check: non-superAdmin cannot edit superAdmin profile (same as edit() method)
Self-edit path preserved: when no 'edit' parameter, falls back to Sentinel::getUser()

name: Fix_AffiliateSalesSum
observations: FIXED Task 7: affiliate_sales_sum (Сумма по СПП) now gated by admin-only checks
sellForm.blade.php: wrapped field in @if($canManageOwnerFields) - same gate as source/owner fields
__table_view_list.blade.php: added $user && $user->hasAnyAccess('admin', 'superAdmin') check around СПП display

name: Fix_PhoneAddressVisibility
observations: FIXED Task 8: Phone/address visibility across 4 view files
rent/show.blade.php:172 - changed @elseif(!$user||...) to @elseif($user) - phone no longer leaks to unauthenticated
exchange/show.blade.php:216 - phone now gated by view.exchange.contacts, else shows 'Открыть доступ' link
exchange/show.blade.php:178-194 - address ungated, now visible to ALL users (per user requirement)
__table_view_list.blade.php:166-173 - exchange phone else-branch replaced with name+type+subscription link (no phone)
__table_view_list.blade.php:116-127 - exchange address ungated, now uses @include always (per user requirement)

name: Fix_ExchangeBadge
observations: FIXED Task 2: Exchange ads now show 'Обмен' badge when displayed in sell listings
Added Обмен badge based on $ad->ad_type === 'Обмен'
Applied to 3 views: sell/grid_view_list.blade.php, sell/row_view_list.blade.php, __table_view_list.blade.php
Badge only shows in sell context ($ads_type === 'sell') for exchange ads mixed via include_exchanges filter

name: Fix_RoomNumberRequired
observations: FIXED Task 4: room_number field now required in form and all 6 Request validation classes
formsGeoMapBlock.blade.php: added 'required' attribute to Form::text
Changed 'nullable|string' to 'required|string' in: AdStoreRequest, AdsSellUpdateRequest, AdsRentRequest, AdsRentUpdateRequest, AdsExchangeRequest, AdsExchangeUpdateRequest
Note: AdsCheckRequest.php already had commented-out required rule - original developer intended this

name: Fix_TooltipTypDopl
observations: FIXED Task 6 (prior session): __filter-exchange.blade.php line 312 tooltip changed from 'Тип обмена' to 'Тип доплаты'

name: RememberMe_Analysis
observations: Task 5: No code bug found in Remember Me implementation
Login flow: checkbox name='remember' -> request->has('remember') -> Sentinel::authenticateAndRemember() -> persist with cookie
Sentinel uses IlluminateCookie::put() with $jar->forever() (5-year cookie)
Cookie key: 'cartalyst_sentinel' from config
Likely environmental causes: SESSION_SECURE_COOKIE=true on HTTP, SESSION_DOMAIN mismatch with subdomains, APP_KEY change invalidating encrypted cookies
Need runtime testing: check browser DevTools -> Application -> Cookies after login with remember checked

name: Landing SEO Manager
observations: Lives in lider-garant app under src/components/seo and src/app/seo-manager
Uses Radix Dialog-based editor component SeoPageEditor inside SeoDashboard
Editor manages popular_searches as array of {text, href} and auto-applies create-page layout when template fields or presets are present
Production public SEO API list currently has no published page with slug 'ved', so /ved falls back to frontend defaultPopularSearchTerms in src/app/ved/ved-client.tsx rather than backend SEO data
Safari-friendly fix for SeoPageEditor uses flex wrappers with basis-0 min-h-0 and a single inner overflow-y-auto scroller instead of h-0 nested scroll traps

Regression note 2026-03-07: replacing `h-0` with `basis-0` on SeoPageEditor middle flex containers caused the modal body to collapse to 0 height under DialogContent's max-height + overflow-hidden sizing; safe hotfix is to restore `flex-1 h-0 min-h-0` on the editor body, tabs root, and inner scroll container

Safer structural fix replaces modal SEO editor with dedicated routes `/seo-manager/dashboard/create` and `/seo-manager/dashboard/edit/[...slug]` plus a 2-step page editor, removing the Radix dialog overflow stack from the main edit flow

name: SeoPage Backend
observations: Model backend/apps/seo/models.py stores popular_searches as JSONField list of {text, href} objects
Serializer normalizes bare slugs to local paths and validates popular_searches href formats
Published/public pages are served by SeoPageViewSet while admin_list returns drafts and published pages for SEO dashboard
Live public endpoint /api/seo/pages/ is reachable, but direct detail request for /api/seo/pages/ved/ returned 404 during investigation on 2026-03-07
VED popular_searches template was synchronized with landing fallback terms on 2026-03-07 using a long canonical international-payments keyword set

name: ROMANOV exchange filter tooltip
observations: [Project: ROMANOV] In the frontend exchange filter, the field "Тип доплаты" is expected to have tooltip text "Тип доплаты".

name: Landing SEO Editor
observations: `lider-garant/src/components/seo/seo-dashboard.tsx` opens `SeoPageEditor` inline as a modal from the dashboard list
`lider-garant/src/components/seo/seo-page-editor.tsx` is a large Radix Dialog with 5 tabs and internal scroll regions
Current editor layout combines dialog overlay scrolling, dialog content max-height, and nested tab-panel scrolling, which increases Safari small-screen scroll risk
`lider-garant/src/components/AppShell.tsx` already treats `/seo-manager` routes as isolated chrome-free admin pages, making a dedicated editor route structurally feasible
